revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data British Solomon Islands]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data British Solomon Islands]]</includeonly>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = British Solomon Islands | shortname alias = Solomon Islands | flag alias = Flag of the Solomon Islands (1966–1977).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Solomon Islands (1956–1977).svg | flag alias-1893 = Flag of the United Kingdom (1-2).svg | flag alias-1906 = Flag of the Solomon Islands (1906–1947).svg | flag alias-civil-1906 = Civil Ensign of the Solomon Islands (1906–1947).svg | flag alias-1947 = Flag of the Solomon Islands (1947–1956).svg | flag alias-civil-1947 = Civil Ensign of the Solomon Islands (1947–1956).svg | flag alias-1956 = Flag of the Solomon Islands (1956–1966).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = 1893 | var3 = 1906 | var4 = civil-1906 | var5 = 1947 | var6 = civil-1947 | var7 = 1956 | redir1 = British Solomon Islands Protectorate | redir2 = Solomon Islands Protectorate | related1 = Solomon Islands </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
